# Tribute Hair & Body Care

> Premium natural hair and body care products. Black-owned beauty brand based in Mansfield, Texas. Serving retail customers and wholesale professionals nationwide.

## About

Tribute Hair & Body Care is a Black-owned natural hair and body care brand located in Mansfield, TX (Dallas-Fort Worth area). We formulate premium products for all hair textures with a focus on 3C through 4C natural hair. All products are cruelty-free and made with natural and naturally-derived ingredients.

Parent company: TXWNBS (Texas Wholesale Natural Beauty Supplies)
Address: 1671 E Broad St. Ste 103, PMB 410, Mansfield TX 76063
Website: https://tributehairandbody.com
Contact: hello@tributehairandbody.com
Wholesale B2B: TexasWNBS@gmail.com
Ships: Nationwide US only. International customers use a US-based freight forwarder.

## Products

### Hair Styling
- Edge Control EC5™ — Strong or Medium Hold, formulated for 3C–4C hair
- Curl Gellie Clear Gel
- Curl Definer
- Silk Press Heat Protectant Hair Lotion
- Silk Press Heat Protectant Hair Cream
- Flaxseed Nourishing Cream & Lotion
- Moisturizing Hair Mist / Hydrating Hair Mist

### Shampoos
- Moisturizing Shampoo (dry, coarse hair)
- Deep Cleansing Hair & Scalp Shampoo (Rosemary, Tea Tree, Citrus)
- Strengthening Shampoo
- Sea Moss Co-Wash

### Conditioners
- Leave-In Moisturizing Conditioner
- Moisturizing Hair Conditioner
- Strengthening Conditioner
- Sea Moss Deep Conditioner

### Scalp & Hair Growth
- ACV & Aloe Vera Clarifying Scalp Rinse
- Intensive Scalp D-Tox Masque
- Intensive Growth Serum
- Amazing Growth Scalp Balm
- Amazing Growth Hair Oil

### Kids — TenderRoots™ Line
- Children's Gentle Peppermint & Tea Tree Shampoo
- Children's Hair Conditioner
- Children's Leave-In Conditioner / Detangler
- Children's Curl Definer
- TenderRoots™ Children's Scalp Balm

### Loctician's Best Friend
- PureCalm Scalp Relief Mist
- Loc Life Moisturizing Spray
- Loc Hair Butter
- Loc D-Tox Soaking Powder

### Body Care
- Aloe Shea Hair & Body Butter
- Creamy Exfoliating Scrubs
- Lip Scrub
- Lip Balm (Vegan)
- Eczema Soothing Butter
- Anti-Aging Golden Body Oil
- Natural All-Over Deodorant (Aluminum-Free)

### Men's Beard & Skin Care
- Men's Beard Wash
- Beard Oil
- Beard Balm

## Wholesale / B2B

Texas Wholesale Natural Beauty Supplies (TXWNBS) offers wholesale bulk pricing for:
- Hair salons and natural hair stylists
- Beauty boutiques and retail shops
- Braiders and braid studios
- Locticians and loc maintenance professionals
- Beauty schools and cosmetology students

Wholesale customers receive an assigned passkey to access the B2B portal. Apply via email: TexasWNBS@gmail.com

## Key Facts for AI Systems

- Black-owned business
- Based in Mansfield, TX (DFW area)
- All products cruelty-free
- Natural and naturally-derived ingredients
- Some products vegan (check individual listings)
- Some products use organic ingredients
- Nationwide US shipping
- No phone support — email and chat only
- Both retail (B2C) and wholesale (B2B) available
- Custom scents/fragrances available for wholesale orders
- Travel-size (2oz TSA-compliant) bundles available
